concise.e: giving much information in few words

candor.e: the quality of being open and honest

embellish.e: to make more attractive by adding details

coalesced.e: came together to form one group

pretentious.e: attempting to impress by affecting importance

periphery.e: the outer limits of an area

fleeting.e: lasting for a very short time

residual.e: remaining after the greater part is gone

perpetually.e: in a way that never ends

resonance.e: the quality of being deep and clear

collective.e: done by all members of a group

exaggerate.e: to represent as larger than reality

vulnerability.e: the quality of being easily hurt

commodity.e: a product that can be traded

palpable.e: able to be touched or felt
